title: Support handling `$dumpvars` arguments
body:
Implement handling of $dumpvars according to IEEE spec.

- Respect the level of depth (first argument) for modules (not for arrays/structs which are always included integrally)
- Respect the current module where it's called, even if inlined
- Support multiple variables/modules in one call
- Support starting to trace elements after in time

Fixes https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/5726
